summary: Comprehensive testing of Discord OAuth2 'Invite Bot to Server' feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - verified Invite Bot button, 3-step setup guide, Manual Setup fallback, Listen Mode, Reply Style, Save Configuration, and Start Bot controls. OAuth callback error handling verified with proper toast messages.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and interactions verified

backend_api.login_flow: PASS - Login with username 'administrator' and password 'Admin@123' works
backend_api.discord_oauth_url: PASS - Returns valid Discord OAuth2 URL with client_id, permissions, scope=bot, redirect_uri, response_type=code, state=instance_id
backend_api.discord_config_oauth_enabled: PASS - Returns oauth_enabled: true when DISCORD_CLIENT_ID is set
backend_api.discord_config_oauth_connected: PASS - Returns oauth_connected field when present
backend_api.discord_config_no_token_exposure: PASS - Does not expose actual bot_token in response
backend_api.discord_callback_error_param: PASS - Redirects to frontend with oauth=error&reason=access_denied
backend_api.discord_callback_missing_code: PASS - Redirects to frontend with oauth=error&reason=no_code
backend_api.discord_callback_no_auth: PASS - Callback endpoint is NOT behind auth (public for Discord redirect)
backend_api.discord_config_update: PASS - PUT /api/discord/config works to save configuration

frontend_ui.invite_bot_button: PASS - 'Invite Bot to Server' button visible and clickable when oauth_enabled
frontend_ui.setup_guide_3_steps: PASS - Shows 3-step guide: Enable Intent, Invite Bot, Configure & Start
frontend_ui.manual_setup_advanced: PASS - Shows 'Manual Setup (Advanced)' section with token input when not oauth_connected
frontend_ui.listen_mode_controls: PASS - All 3 options work: Mention Only, All Channels, Specific Channels
frontend_ui.reply_style_controls: PASS - Both options work: Natural reply, With @mention
frontend_ui.save_configuration: PASS - Save Configuration button works, shows success toast
frontend_ui.start_bot_button: PASS - Start Bot button visible and clickable
frontend_ui.active_toggle: PASS - Bot Active toggle switches between Active/Inactive
frontend_ui.bot_status_section: PASS - Bot Status section shows Online/Offline status
frontend_ui.oauth_error_handling: PASS - Shows error toast 'Bot invitation was cancelled.' for access_denied
frontend_ui.oauth_success_handling: PASS - Shows success toast 'Bot invited to "TestServer" successfully!'
frontend_ui.url_params_cleared: PASS - OAuth params cleared from URL after handling

context_for_next_testing_agent: Discord OAuth2 feature fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. Frontend shows Invite Bot button, 3-step setup guide, and Manual Setup fallback. OAuth callback error handling works with proper toast messages. Login credentials: administrator / Admin@123. Instance ID: 96966c6c-2c2e-47e5-91f9-0518dfe25e34.
